mcptool.name: request_intake_model_app_20d5b868_getrequestdetails
mcptool.description: Retrieves the requester’s submitted project or issue details from the Power App, including fields such as Title, Description, Problem Statement, Business Need, and other context captured in the intake form.
mcptool.inputschema: {"type":"object","properties":{"Target":{"type":"string","description":"Target entity reference. Format: 'msdyn_aimodel(0fb6ab1f-1c3c-4061-ba15-2a8b3965ce90)'. Bound to 'msdyn_aimodel'.","x-ms-bound-entity":"msdyn_aimodel","x-ms-customapi-paramtype":"entityReference"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"Required request parameter for msdyn_PrettyPredict.","default":"2.0"},"request":{"type":"string","description":"Serialized JSON request payload. Expected shape: {\"type\":\"object\",\"properties\":{},\"required\":[]}","x-ms-customapi-paramtype":"entity"},"source":{"type":"string","description":"JSON string with shape: { \"consumptionSource\": string, \"partnerSource\": string, \"consumptionSourceVersion\": string }. Serialized source metadata identifying the caller.","default":"{\"consumptionSource\":\"PowerApps\",\"partnerSource\":\"PowerApps.CustomMcpTool\",\"consumptionSourceVersion\":\"1.0\"}"}},"required":["Target","version","request","source"]}
mcptool.title: GetRequestDetails
